nonMigratable.reasoning: Requires Neo4j graph database for entity extraction and multi-hop reasoning
alternatives: Implement graph-like functionality using pgvector with relationship metadata
Use OpenAI function calling for entity extraction
Store citation chains in JSON format within vector documents

nonMigratable.reasoning: Complete dependency on Contextual AI SaaS platform
alternatives: Implement OpenAI-based RAG with similar API wrapper
Consider building custom RAG service using Supabase

nonMigratable.reasoning: Uses RAGLite framework with complex hybrid search pipeline
alternatives: Convert to pgvector similarity search with BM25 keyword search using pg_search
Implement custom hybrid search using Supabase
Use OpenAI-based reranking for result combination

conversionNotes.deepseek_local_rag_agent: Converted DeepSeek-R1 local model to OpenAI GPT-4o API calls. Maintained RAG architecture with pgvector. Created openai-wrapper.ts with RAG retrieval logic.
conversionNotes.qwen_local_rag: Converted Qwen3 local model to OpenAI GPT-4o API calls. Maintained RAG architecture with pgvector. Created openai-wrapper.ts with RAG retrieval logic.
conversionNotes.llama3.1_local_rag: Converted Llama3.1 local model to OpenAI GPT-4o API calls. Maintained RAG architecture with pgvector. Created openai-wrapper.ts with RAG retrieval logic.
conversionNotes.agentic_rag_embedding_gemma: Converted Gemma local embeddings to OpenAI text-embedding-3-small. Maintained RAG architecture. Created openai-wrapper.ts with embedding conversion.
conversionNotes.knowledge_graph_rag_citations: Non-migratable: Requires Neo4j graph database for entity extraction and multi-hop reasoning. Alternatives: pgvector with relationship metadata, OpenAI function calling for entity extraction, JSON citation storage.
conversionNotes.contextualai_rag_agent: Non-migratable: Complete dependency on Contextual AI SaaS platform. Alternatives: External service integration, OpenAI-based RAG wrapper, custom Supabase RAG service.
conversionNotes.vision_rag: Converted Gemini Vision multimodal embeddings to GPT-4o Vision API with pgvector storage for image metadata. Created vision-wrapper.ts with image captioning and embedding logic.
conversionNotes.rag-as-a-service: Implemented OpenAI as primary LLM with fallback chain architecture. Maintained multi-step RAG logic. Created fallback-chain.ts for provider failover.
conversionNotes.corrective_rag: Implemented OpenAI as primary LLM with fallback chain architecture. Maintained corrective RAG logic with document grading. Created fallback-chain.ts for provider failover.
conversionNotes.hybrid_search_rag: Converted RAGLite hybrid search to pgvector similarity search with BM25 keyword search fallback and OpenAI-based reranking. Created hybrid-search.ts with combined retrieval logic.

specializedApproaches: OpenAI API replacement for local LLMs
Hybrid search with pgvector + keyword search + AI reranking
